# jellyfin-mcp

Bundled from [jaredtrent/jellyfin-mcp](https://github.com/jaredtrent/jellyfin-mcp)

- **Author**: Jared Trent
- **License**: MIT

## Building from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/jaredtrent/jellyfin-mcp.git
cd jellyfin-mcp
go build -o jellyfin-mcp .
```
